subject: Fermi GRB190425.09 Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

D. Buckley, S. Potter, A. Kniazev, M. Kotze
South African Astronomical Observatory



MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB190425.09 ( 21h 37m 19.20s , -37d 28m 48.00s, R=11.56) errorbox  566 sec after trigger time at 2019-04-25 02:17:09 UT, with upper limit up to  19.1 mag. The observations began at zenit distance = 47 deg. The sun  altitude  is -36.3 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -60 deg., longitude l = 98 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1003237

We obtain a following upper limits.
